text:
> GNU_CONFIGURE=  yes
> CONFIGURE_ARGS= --prefix=${PREFIX}

.if defined(GNU_CONFIGURE)
CONFIGURE_ARGS+=        --prefix=${PREFIX}
HAS_CONFIGURE=          yes
.endif    

This is already defined in bsd.port.mk, I will change it before I import
this.


-Bill Fumerola
